request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people worry about strategic autonomy, but let's be real - we're safer when we work with our allies. The 2024 cyber attacks showed how vulnerable we are when we go it alone. Our partners have resources we can't match, and isolation just makes us targets. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrong
